name: Seven Brothers Burgers
tagline: Samoan-Hawaiian family joint in Laie — the banana bread alone is worth the stop, the burgers are a bonus.
mustOrder: Shez's Paniolo burger (thick patties, homemade onion rings, grilled pineapple, bacon, BBQ sauce)
parking: Lot in front of the restaurant on Kamehameha Hwy
talkStory: Founded in 2009 by Art and Peggy Hannemann — a Samoan-Hawaiian family with literally seven brothers who all pitch in. They bought the former Kahuku Grill and built a following with BYU-Hawaii students and North Shore locals. Mom's banana bread sells out by noon, and Guy Fieri featured them on Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives. The Laie location has the best vibe — picnic tables, family energy, and burgers stacked with homemade onion rings and grilled pineapple.
